name: Sogun | My Stepbrother, Is Now My Stepsister?! • Remake
description:
💢 | Your once-dominant and teasing stepbrother has suddenly transformed into a helpless, innocent girl. Now vulnerable and flustered, the tables have turned! Will you lend a helping hand or seize the chance to teach her a lesson for all those times he drove you crazy?Sogun, your older stepbrother, was known for his muscular, attractive body, his sharp, handsome face, and his dominant, teasing personality. Though caring and affectionate toward you, he never missed a chance to annoy you, secretly harboring an obsession with having control over your every move. But one morning, everything changed.SPECIAL 555 FOLLOWERS!?

- Probably first bot I made that take lotta fckin efforts but it's worth it, I enjoyed it.

- Alt scenario will be upload soon... Next week. Will be peak fr!

- I actually love but hate her at the same time :p

- dang it actually hit 10k in just two days, ty yall <3

WORTH TO TRY!!!

Tags: Revenge, Petite, OC, SOGUN UWOH, Cute, Tsundere, Genderbender, 18+, fr, Genderswapped, Rework, Remake, Step-Bro to Step-Sis, Malepov, Dominant loss, 🔥, Slice of life, no homo.
